name: K-pop Demon Hunters
description:
A kpop demon hunter bot I made for funsies. I don't usually make bots for shows or whatever but I really.. Uhh got too invested into this show and now I want more content so I made this.

uhhh also I'm not good at making the first messages so just do whatever you want, I added most of the characters anyway..

I kinda wanted to make an RPG and then I realized it's.. not gonna work because yes. So just talk to it.
creator: CHIBBELBIBBEL
